verses.latin_vulgate: Hæ sunt mansiones filiorum Israël, qui egressi sunt de Ægypto per turmas suas in manu Moysi et Aaron,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: אֵ֜לֶּה מַסְעֵ֣י בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֗ל אֲשֶׁ֥ר יָצְא֛וּ מֵאֶ֥רֶץ מִצְרַ֖יִם לְצִבְאֹתָ֑ם בְּיַד־מֹשֶׁ֖ה וְאַהֲרֹֽן׃
verses.king_james: These are the journeys of the children of Israel, which went forth out of the land of Egypt with their armies under the hand of Moses and Aaron.

verses.latin_vulgate: quas descripsit Moyses juxta castrorum loca, quæ Domini jussione mutabant.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּכְתֹּ֨ב מֹשֶׁ֜ה אֶת־מוֹצָאֵיהֶ֛ם לְמַסְעֵיהֶ֖ם עַל־פִּ֣י יְהֹוָ֑ה וְאֵ֥לֶּה מַסְעֵיהֶ֖ם לְמוֹצָאֵיהֶֽם׃
verses.king_james: And Moses wrote their goings out according to their journeys by the commandment of the Lord: and these are their journeys according to their goings out.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profecti igitur de Ramesse mense primo, quintadecima die mensis primi, altera die Phase, filii Israël in manu excelsa, videntibus cunctis Ægyptiis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֤וּ מֵֽרַעְמְסֵס֙ בַּחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֔וֹן בַּחֲמִשָּׁ֥ה עָשָׂ֛ר י֖וֹם לַחֹ֣דֶשׁ הָרִאשׁ֑וֹן מִֽמׇּחֳרַ֣ת הַפֶּ֗סַח יָצְא֤וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ בְּיָ֣ד רָמָ֔ה לְעֵינֵ֖י כׇּל־מִצְרָֽיִם׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Rameses in the first month, on the fifteenth day of the first month; on the morrow after the passover the children of Israel went out with an high hand in the sight of all the Egyptians.

verses.latin_vulgate: et sepelientibus primogenitos, quos percusserat Dominus (nam et in diis eorum exercuerat ultionem),
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וּמִצְרַ֣יִם מְקַבְּרִ֗ים אֵת֩ אֲשֶׁ֨ר הִכָּ֧ה יְהֹוָ֛ה בָּהֶ֖ם כׇּל־בְּכ֑וֹר וּבֵאלֹ֣הֵיהֶ֔ם עָשָׂ֥ה יְהֹוָ֖ה שְׁפָטִֽים׃
verses.king_james: For the Egyptians buried all their firstborn, which the Lord had smitten among them: upon their gods also the Lord executed judgments.

verses.latin_vulgate: castrametati sunt in Soccoth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֥וּ בְנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵ֖ל מֵרַעְמְסֵ֑ס וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּסֻכֹּֽת׃
verses.king_james: And the children of Israel removed from Rameses, and pitched in Succoth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Soccoth venerunt in Etham, quæ est in extremis finibus solitudinis.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִסֻּכֹּ֑ת וַיַּחֲנ֣וּ בְאֵתָ֔ם אֲשֶׁ֖ר בִּקְצֵ֥ה הַמִּדְבָּֽר׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Succoth, and pitched in Etham, which is in the edge of the wilderness.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inde egressi venerunt contra Phihahiroth, quæ respicit Beelsephon, et castrametati sunt ante Magdalum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְעוּ֙ מֵֽאֵתָ֔ם וַיָּ֙שׇׁב֙ עַל־פִּ֣י הַחִירֹ֔ת אֲשֶׁ֥ר עַל־פְּנֵ֖י בַּ֣עַל צְפ֑וֹן וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ לִפְנֵ֥י מִגְדֹּֽל׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Etham, and turned again unto Pi–hahiroth, which is before Baal–zephon: and they pitched before Migdol.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Phihahiroth, transierunt per medium mare in solitudinem : et ambulantes tribus diebus per desertum Etham, castrametati sunt in Mara.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְעוּ֙ מִפְּנֵ֣י הַֽחִירֹ֔ת וַיַּֽעַבְר֥וּ בְתוֹךְ־הַיָּ֖ם הַמִּדְבָּ֑רָה וַיֵּ֨לְכ֜וּ דֶּ֣רֶךְ שְׁלֹ֤שֶׁת יָמִים֙ בְּמִדְבַּ֣ר אֵתָ֔ם וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּמָרָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from before Pi–hahiroth, and passed through the midst of the sea into the wilderness, and went three days’ journey in the wilderness of Etham, and pitched in Marah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Mara, venerunt in Elim, ubi erant duodecim fontes aquarum, et palmæ septuaginta : ibique castrametati sunt.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְעוּ֙ מִמָּרָ֔ה וַיָּבֹ֖אוּ אֵילִ֑מָה וּ֠בְאֵילִ֠ם שְׁתֵּ֣ים עֶשְׂרֵ֞ה עֵינֹ֥ת מַ֛יִם וְשִׁבְעִ֥ים תְּמָרִ֖ים וַיַּחֲנוּ־שָֽׁם׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Marah, and came unto Elim: and in Elim were twelve fountains of water, and threescore and ten palm trees; and they pitched there.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et inde egressi, fixerunt tentoria super mare Rubrum. Profectique de mari Rubro,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵאֵילִ֑ם וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ עַל־יַם־סֽוּף׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Elim, and encamped by the Red sea.

verses.latin_vulgate: castrametati sunt in deserto Sin.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִיַּם־ס֑וּף וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּמִדְבַּר־סִֽין׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from the Red sea, and encamped in the wilderness of Sin.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde egressi, venerunt in Daphca.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִמִּדְבַּר־סִ֑ין וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּדׇפְקָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they took their journey out of the wilderness of Sin, and encamped in Dophkah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Daphca, castrametati sunt in Alus.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִדׇּפְקָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּאָלֽוּשׁ׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Dophkah, and encamped in Alush.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique de Alus, in Raphidim fixere tentoria, ubi populo defuit aqua ad bibendum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵאָל֑וּשׁ וַֽיַּחֲנוּ֙ בִּרְפִידִ֔ם וְלֹא־הָ֨יָה שָׁ֥ם מַ֛יִם לָעָ֖ם לִשְׁתּֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Alush, and encamped at Rephidim, where was no water for the people to drink.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Raphidim, castrametati sunt in deserto Sinai.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵרְפִידִ֑ם וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּמִדְבַּ֥ר סִינָֽי׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Rephidim, and pitched in the wilderness of Sinai.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sed et de solitudine Sinai egressi, venerunt ad sepulchra concupiscentiæ.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִמִּדְבַּ֣ר סִינָ֑י וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּקִבְרֹ֥ת הַֽתַּאֲוָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from the desert of Sinai, and pitched at Kibroth–hattaavah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de sepulchris concupiscentiæ, castrametati sunt in Haseroth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִקִּבְרֹ֣ת הַֽתַּאֲוָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בַּחֲצֵרֹֽת׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Kibroth–hattaavah, and encamped at Hazeroth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Haseroth venerunt in Rethma.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵחֲצֵרֹ֑ת וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּרִתְמָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Hazeroth, and pitched in Rithmah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Rethma, castrametati sunt in Remmomphares.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵרִתְמָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּרִמֹּ֥ן פָּֽרֶץ׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Rithmah, and pitched at Rimmon–parez.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde egressi venerunt in Lebna.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵרִמֹּ֣ן פָּ֑רֶץ וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּלִבְנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Rimmon–parez, and pitched in Libnah.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Lebna castrametati sunt in Ressa.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִלִּבְנָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּרִסָּֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Libnah, and pitched at Rissah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique de Ressa, venerunt in Ceelatha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵרִסָּ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בִּקְהֵלָֽתָה׃
verses.king_james: And they journeyed from Rissah, and pitched in Kehelathah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde profecti, castrametati sunt in monte Sepher.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִקְּהֵלָ֑תָה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּהַר־שָֽׁפֶר׃
verses.king_james: And they went from Kehelathah, and pitched in mount Shapher.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressi de monte Sepher, venerunt in Arada.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵֽהַר־שָׁ֑פֶר וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בַּחֲרָדָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from mount Shapher, and encamped in Haradah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inde proficiscentes, castrametati sunt in Maceloth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵחֲרָדָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּמַקְהֵלֹֽת׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Haradah, and pitched in Makheloth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Maceloth, venerunt in Thahath.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִמַּקְהֵלֹ֑ת וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּתָֽחַת׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Makheloth, and encamped at Tahath.

verses.latin_vulgate: De Thahath, castrametati sunt in Thare.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִתָּ֑חַת וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּתָֽרַח׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Tahath, and pitched at Tarah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde egressi, fixere tentoria in Methca.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִתָּ֑רַח וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּמִתְקָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Tarah, and pitched in Mithcah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Methca, castrametati sunt in Hesmona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִמִּתְקָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּחַשְׁמֹנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they went from Mithcah, and pitched in Hashmonah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Hesmona, venerunt in Moseroth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵֽחַשְׁמֹנָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּמֹסֵרֽוֹת׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Hashmonah, and encamped at Moseroth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Moseroth, castrametati sunt in Benejaacan.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִמֹּסֵר֑וֹת וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בִּבְנֵ֥י יַעֲקָֽן׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Moseroth, and pitched in Bene–jaakan.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Benejaacan, venerunt in montem Gadgad.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִבְּנֵ֣י יַעֲקָ֑ן וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּחֹ֥ר הַגִּדְגָּֽד׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Bene–jaakan, and encamped at Hor–hagidgad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde profecti, castrametati sunt in Jetebatha.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵחֹ֣ר הַגִּדְגָּ֑ד וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּיׇטְבָֽתָה׃
verses.king_james: And they went from Hor–hagidgad, and pitched in Jotbathah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Jetebatha venerunt in Hebrona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִיׇּטְבָ֑תָה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּעַבְרֹנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Jotbathah, and encamped at Ebronah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique de Hebrona, castrametati sunt in Asiongaber.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵֽעַבְרֹנָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּעֶצְיֹ֥ן גָּֽבֶר׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Ebronah, and encamped at Ezion–gaber.

verses.latin_vulgate: Inde profecti, venerunt in desertum Sin, hæc est Cades.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵעֶצְיֹ֣ן גָּ֑בֶר וַיַּחֲנ֥וּ בְמִדְבַּר־צִ֖ן הִ֥וא קָדֵֽשׁ׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Ezion–gaber, and pitched in the wilderness of Zin, which is Kadesh.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique de Cades, castrametati sunt in monte Hor, in extremis finibus terræ Edom.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִקָּדֵ֑שׁ וַֽיַּחֲנוּ֙ בְּהֹ֣ר הָהָ֔ר בִּקְצֵ֖ה אֶ֥רֶץ אֱדֽוֹם׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Kadesh, and pitched in mount Hor, in the edge of the land of Edom.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ascenditque Aaron sacerdos in montem Hor jubente Domino : et ibi mortuus est anno quadragesimo egressionis filiorum Israël ex Ægypto, mense quinto, prima die mensis,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּ֩עַל֩ אַהֲרֹ֨ן הַכֹּהֵ֜ן אֶל־הֹ֥ר הָהָ֛ר עַל־פִּ֥י יְהֹוָ֖ה וַיָּ֣מׇת שָׁ֑ם בִּשְׁנַ֣ת הָֽאַרְבָּעִ֗ים לְצֵ֤את בְּנֵֽי־יִשְׂרָאֵל֙ מֵאֶ֣רֶץ מִצְרַ֔יִם בַּחֹ֥דֶשׁ הַחֲמִישִׁ֖י בְּאֶחָ֥ד לַחֹֽדֶשׁ׃
verses.king_james: And Aaron the priest went up into mount Hor at the commandment of the Lord, and died there, in the fortieth year after the children of Israel were come out of the land of Egypt, in the first day of the fifth month.

verses.latin_vulgate: cum esset annorum centum viginti trium.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאַהֲרֹ֔ן בֶּן־שָׁלֹ֧שׁ וְעֶשְׂרִ֛ים וּמְאַ֖ת שָׁנָ֑ה בְּמֹת֖וֹ בְּהֹ֥ר הָהָֽר׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And Aaron was an hundred and twenty and three years old when he died in mount Hor.

verses.latin_vulgate: Audivitque Chananæus rex Arad, qui habitabat ad meridiem, in terram Chanaan venisse filios Israël.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּשְׁמַ֗ע הַֽכְּנַעֲנִי֙ מֶ֣לֶךְ עֲרָ֔ד וְהֽוּא־יֹשֵׁ֥ב בַּנֶּ֖גֶב בְּאֶ֣רֶץ כְּנָ֑עַן בְּבֹ֖א בְּנֵ֥י יִשְׂרָאֵֽל׃
verses.king_james: And king Arad the Canaanite, which dwelt in the south in the land of Canaan, heard of the coming of the children of Israel.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et profecti de monte Hor, castrametati sunt in Salmona.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵהֹ֣ר הָהָ֑ר וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּצַלְמֹנָֽה׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from mount Hor, and pitched in Zalmonah.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde egressi, venerunt in Phunon.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִצַּלְמֹנָ֑ה וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּפוּנֹֽן׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Zalmonah, and pitched in Punon.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Phunon, castrametati sunt in Oboth.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִפּוּנֹ֑ן וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּאֹבֹֽת׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Punon, and pitched in Oboth.

verses.latin_vulgate: Et de Oboth venerunt in Ijeabarim, quæ est in finibus Moabitarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵאֹבֹ֑ת וַֽיַּחֲנ֛וּ בְּעִיֵּ֥י הָעֲבָרִ֖ים בִּגְב֥וּל מוֹאָֽב׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Oboth, and pitched in Ije–abarim, in the border of Moab.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de Ijeabarim, fixere tentoria in Dibongad.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵעִיִּ֑ים וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּדִיבֹ֥ן גָּֽד׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from Iim, and pitched in Dibon–gad.

verses.latin_vulgate: Unde egressi, castrametati sunt in Helmondeblathaim.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מִדִּיבֹ֣ן גָּ֑ד וַֽיַּחֲנ֖וּ בְּעַלְמֹ֥ן דִּבְלָתָֽיְמָה׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Dibon–gad, and encamped in Almon–diblathaim.

verses.latin_vulgate: Egressique de Helmondeblathaim, venerunt ad montes Abarim contra Nabo.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵעַלְמֹ֣ן דִּבְלָתָ֑יְמָה וַֽיַּחֲנ֛וּ בְּהָרֵ֥י הָעֲבָרִ֖ים לִפְנֵ֥י נְבֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And they removed from Almon–diblathaim, and pitched in the mountains of Abarim, before Nebo.

verses.latin_vulgate: Profectique de montibus Abarim, transierunt ad campestria Moab, supra Jordanem, contra Jericho.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיִּסְע֖וּ מֵהָרֵ֣י הָעֲבָרִ֑ים וַֽיַּחֲנוּ֙ בְּעַֽרְבֹ֣ת מוֹאָ֔ב עַ֖ל יַרְדֵּ֥ן יְרֵחֽוֹ׃
verses.king_james: And they departed from the mountains of Abarim, and pitched in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ibique castrametati sunt de Bethsimoth usque ad Abelsatim in planioribus locis Moabitarum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיַּחֲנ֤וּ עַל־הַיַּרְדֵּן֙ מִבֵּ֣ית הַיְשִׁמֹ֔ת עַ֖ד אָבֵ֣ל הַשִּׁטִּ֑ים בְּעַֽרְבֹ֖ת מוֹאָֽב׃ {ס}
verses.king_james: And they pitched by Jordan, from Beth–jesimoth even unto Abel–shittim in the plains of Moab.

verses.latin_vulgate: Ubi locutus est Dominus ad Moysen :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וַיְדַבֵּ֧ר יְהֹוָ֛ה אֶל־מֹשֶׁ֖ה בְּעַֽרְבֹ֣ת מוֹאָ֑ב עַל־יַרְדֵּ֥ן יְרֵח֖וֹ לֵאמֹֽר׃
verses.king_james: And the Lord spake unto Moses in the plains of Moab by Jordan near Jericho, saying,

verses.latin_vulgate: Præcipe filiis Israël, et dic ad eos : Quando transieritis Jordanem, intrantes terram Chanaan,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: דַּבֵּר֙ אֶל־בְּנֵ֣י יִשְׂרָאֵ֔ל וְאָמַרְתָּ֖ אֲלֵהֶ֑ם כִּ֥י אַתֶּ֛ם עֹבְרִ֥ים אֶת־הַיַּרְדֵּ֖ן אֶל־אֶ֥רֶץ כְּנָֽעַן׃
verses.king_james: Speak unto the children of Israel, and say unto them, When ye are passed over Jordan into the land of Canaan;

verses.latin_vulgate: disperdite cunctos habitatores terræ illius : confringite titulos, et statuas comminuite, atque omnia excelsa vastate,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְה֨וֹרַשְׁתֶּ֜ם אֶת־כׇּל־יֹשְׁבֵ֤י הָאָ֙רֶץ֙ מִפְּנֵיכֶ֔ם וְאִ֨בַּדְתֶּ֔ם אֵ֖ת כׇּל־מַשְׂכִּיֹּתָ֑ם וְאֵ֨ת כׇּל־צַלְמֵ֤י מַסֵּֽכֹתָם֙ תְּאַבֵּ֔דוּ וְאֵ֥ת כׇּל־בָּמוֹתָ֖ם תַּשְׁמִֽידוּ׃
verses.king_james: Then ye shall drive out all the inhabitants of the land from before you, and destroy all their pictures, and destroy all their molten images, and quite pluck down all their high places:

verses.latin_vulgate: mundantes terram, et habitantes in ea. Ego enim dedi vobis illam in possessionem,
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהוֹרַשְׁתֶּ֥ם אֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ וִֽישַׁבְתֶּם־בָּ֑הּ כִּ֥י לָכֶ֛ם נָתַ֥תִּי אֶת־הָאָ֖רֶץ לָרֶ֥שֶׁת אֹתָֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: And ye shall dispossess the inhabitants of the land, and dwell therein: for I have given you the land to possess it.

verses.latin_vulgate: quam dividetis vobis sorte. Pluribus dabitis latiorem, et paucis angustiorem. Singulis ut sors ceciderit, ita tribuetur hæreditas. Per tribus et familias possessio dividetur.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהִתְנַחַלְתֶּם֩ אֶת־הָאָ֨רֶץ בְּגוֹרָ֜ל לְמִשְׁפְּחֹֽתֵיכֶ֗ם לָרַ֞ב תַּרְבּ֤וּ אֶת־נַחֲלָתוֹ֙ וְלַמְעַט֙ תַּמְעִ֣יט אֶת־נַחֲלָת֔וֹ אֶל֩ אֲשֶׁר־יֵ֨צֵא ל֥וֹ שָׁ֛מָּה הַגּוֹרָ֖ל ל֣וֹ יִהְיֶ֑ה לְמַטּ֥וֹת אֲבֹתֵיכֶ֖ם תִּתְנֶחָֽלוּ׃
verses.king_james: And ye shall divide the land by lot for an inheritance among your families: and to the more ye shall give the more inheritance, and to the fewer ye shall give the less inheritance: every man’s inheritance shall be in the place where his lot falleth; according to the tribes of your fathers ye shall inherit.

verses.latin_vulgate: Sin autem nolueritis interficere habitatores terræ : qui remanserint, erunt vobis quasi clavi in oculis, et lanceæ in lateribus, et adversabuntur vobis in terra habitationis vestræ :
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְאִם־לֹ֨א תוֹרִ֜ישׁוּ אֶת־יֹשְׁבֵ֣י הָאָ֘רֶץ֮ מִפְּנֵיכֶם֒ וְהָיָה֙ אֲשֶׁ֣ר תּוֹתִ֣ירוּ מֵהֶ֔ם לְשִׂכִּים֙ בְּעֵ֣ינֵיכֶ֔ם וְלִצְנִינִ֖ם בְּצִדֵּיכֶ֑ם וְצָרְר֣וּ אֶתְכֶ֔ם עַל־הָאָ֕רֶץ אֲשֶׁ֥ר אַתֶּ֖ם יֹשְׁבִ֥ים בָּֽהּ׃
verses.king_james: But if ye will not drive out the inhabitants of the land from before you; then it shall come to pass, that those which ye let remain of them shall be pricks in your eyes, and thorns in your sides, and shall vex you in the land wherein ye dwell.

verses.latin_vulgate: et quidquid illis cogitaveram facere, vobis faciam.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: וְהָיָ֗ה כַּאֲשֶׁ֥ר דִּמִּ֛יתִי לַעֲשׂ֥וֹת לָהֶ֖ם אֶֽעֱשֶׂ֥ה לָכֶֽם׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: Moreover it shall come to pass, that I shall do unto you, as I thought to do unto them.
